decision_context_summary: The governing directive [83fd7cad-f74c-4657-a228-68ca3bc6eacc] mandates the review of Hestami AI Real Property OS specifications [17bf4e80-42bd-4549-a0c2-7998dc63aa6e] and preparation for implementation. Key artifacts produced include functional requirements [995c1ae7-4f6f-4f71-b447-048dcc870e15], system boundaries [b4069ff4-6d5f-4e24-ae33-3f0cae0df4d5], and non-functional requirements [56b84cd8-084f-4a7c-984d-0db6b5c6b9da]. Defined external entities encompass payment [INT-EXT-001-PAYMENT], communication [INT-EXT-002-COMMS], and regulatory [INT-EXT-003-REGULATORY] integrations [4e3d8629-70ec-4da7-a17c-f36c1268f1e0]. API definitions for components like cmp-prop-data [dd574b87-3ceb-4516-8141-df36bf3bc75b] and data models [d2c65340-0191-4ffb-8ee9-f18052baa239] have been documented. The system intent is to support endpoints such as /assets/upload and /assets/search.

open_questions.question: Is the vector index for semantic search fully populated to support cmp-prop-data and cmp-provider-match functionality?
Are the error handling strategies fully integrated within the defined API definitions [dd574b87-3ceb-4516-8141-df36bf3bc75b] and agent outputs [9b4e180c-9a9c-41b7-a2ff-13ceadf431e5]?

completeness_narrative: The design artifacts, requirements, and data models are complete based on level 2 authority records. However, the vector index coverage is currently at 0/142, which impacts the semantic similarity search capabilities required by the defined topics. Additionally, while API definitions exist, the specific implementation details for error handling and token strategies are referenced in topic entities but lack explicit implementation status records in the findings.
